speaker: speaker1
text: I am calling to find out why I didn ’ t receive an unemployment check this week .

speaker: speaker2
text: Did you send in your Continued Claim Form for the last period ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think I forgot to send it in !

speaker: speaker2
text: You need to be very careful to send that form in every two weeks if you want to get paid .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can I send it in now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You should look at your claim form and see if it has been more than fourteen days since it was due . If it hasn ’ t been , we will still accept it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can I mail it in early next time so it isn ’ t late ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Actually , you cannot mail it in early , as it needs to reflect all of the information up to the due date .

speaker: speaker1
text: Will my paycheck come right away now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Your check will arrive a little late .
